title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people visiting a science museum. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: Three students are visiting a science museum. They are standing beside a large model of the solar system and one student is pointing at a planet. There are information displays and lights in the exhibition hall.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows someone watering plants. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A young woman is watering plants on a small balcony. She is holding a green watering can and looking at the flowers. There are pots, a chair and apartment buildings in the background.

followUp.question: Talk about the person. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
